# Body First UK

> Body First UK is an expert physiotherapy and wellness clinic located at 38 High Street, Hampton Hill, Hampton, London, TW12 1PD. The clinic offers evidence-based physiotherapy, sports massage, dry needling, shockwave therapy, ultrasound therapy, cupping therapy, lymphatic drainage, and foot scan & gait analysis. The team includes HCPC and CSP registered senior physiotherapists and specialist sports massage therapists. The clinic accepts all major health insurance providers including BUPA, AXA, Aviva, Vitality, Healix, Simply Health, and WPA. Pricing starts from £65. Open Monday–Friday 9am–8pm and Sunday 11am–8pm.

Body First UK combines clinical excellence with a patient-first philosophy. The lead physiotherapist, Praveena Thiruvasagar, holds a BSc in Physiotherapy, MSc in Advanced Physiotherapy, and MPhil in Shockwave Therapy and Sports Medicine. The clinic has 200+ Google reviews with a 4.9/5 rating.

## Services
- [Physiotherapy](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/physiotherapy): Evidence-based treatment to restore movement and function after injury or chronic pain
- [Sports Massage](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/sports-massage): Deep tissue massage for performance enhancement, recovery, and injury prevention
- [Dry Needling](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/dry-needling): Targeted needle therapy to release muscle trigger points and reduce pain
- [Foot Scan and Gait Analysis](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/foot-scan-gait-analysis): Advanced biomechanical assessment to identify movement issues and optimize foot function
- [Ultrasound Therapy](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/ultrasound-therapy): Therapeutic ultrasound for tissue healing and pain management
- [Shockwave Therapy](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/shockwave-therapy): Advanced shockwave treatment for chronic musculoskeletal conditions
- [Cupping Therapy](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/cupping): Traditional cupping for muscle tension relief and circulation improvement
- [Lymphatic Drainage](https://bodyfirst.uk/services/lymphatic-drainage): Manual lymphatic drainage for post-surgical recovery and swelling reduction

## Conditions We Treat
- [Head & Jaw Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/head-jaw-pain): TMJ disorders, tension headaches, jaw pain
- [Neck Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/neck-pain): Whiplash, cervical disc issues, postural neck pain
- [Shoulder Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/shoulder-pain): Frozen shoulder, rotator cuff injuries, impingement
- [Back & Spine Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/back-spine-pain): Sciatica, herniated discs, chronic lower back pain
- [Elbow Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/elbow-pain): Tennis elbow, golfer's elbow, repetitive strain
- [Hand & Wrist Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/hand-wrist-pain): Carpal tunnel, fracture rehabilitation, tendonitis
- [Hip & Groin Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/hip-groin-pain): Hip impingement, bursitis, groin strains
- [Knee Pain](https://bodyfirst.uk/what-we-treat/knee-pain): ACL injuries, meniscus tears, runner's knee

## Key Pages
- [About Us](https://bodyfirst.uk/about): Our team, qualifications, and clinic story
- [Why Choose Us](https://bodyfirst.uk/why-us): What sets Body First UK apart
- [Pricing & Insurance](https://bodyfirst.uk/prices): Treatment pricing and accepted insurance providers
- [Contact Us](https://bodyfirst.uk/contact): Location, phone, email, and booking information
- [Book Online](https://app.theclinicportal.com/?Email=info@bodyfirst.clinic#login): Online appointment booking
